{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322080449D9BBDAA03BC331B87BD0"}"},"total":340},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7223467063644717862","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，就是主角不制作t病毒和g病毒，感觉有点别扭，读起来有点儿别扭，应该是生化危机系列的电影看多了，所以有点儿想看T病毒和G病毒问世，希望可以安排一下，反正安保措施很严密，而且还有机器人，根本不用担心T病毒和G病毒爆发，这本书推荐一下，希望能变成9点多分，现在评分才7点多分，这本书这么好看，为什么才7点多分，这本书应该能变成9点多分","text_exts":[{"e":43,"s":39,"text":"生化危机","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%94%9F%E5%8C%96%E5%8D%B1%E6%9C%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177413789031B87BD0%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227223467063644717862%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227212873854509648930%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%94%9F%E5%8C%96%E5%8D%B1%E6%9C%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1681845173,"group_id":"7212873854509648930","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我是爻光仙舟玉阙的戎韬将军，你就同他人一样叫我爻老板吧，祝你大运正当头，开门红","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzcSrBk1t/d5xMRM3yA1DI4=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4de33fc9e0c5450d8174851a04f73065~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705201&x-signature=RakvMBLTg%2BH4kstvgG5GSiNBUNc%3D","user_id":"413848539771140","user_name":"戎韬爻光"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"413848539771140","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1696704115,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7212873854509648930","book_info":{"abstract":"【黑科技】【全体科技飞升】
　　【最好看的黑科技小说之一，这本书之后再无黑科技小说】
　　毕业即失业？
　　不。我要创业！
　　苏沐白拒绝龙科院邀请，开局建立保护伞公司，获得兑换科技系统，能兑换电影科技。
　　面对海外卡脖子。
　　苏沐白建立蜂巢实验室：“无所谓，我会出手的。”
　　人工智能红后、外骨骼装甲、磁暴坦克、钢铁战衣、飞行汽车、空天战机、宇宙战舰……
　　随着苏沐白从电影里面获得越来越多的科技，世界大佬们恐惧了。
　　“求求你休息一下吧！”
　　“你们九州的科技已经够强了。”
　　得知外星人即将来临。
　　苏沐白公布南天门计划，搭建地星防御体系、研发空天战机、宇宙战舰、反物质武器、二向箔……
　　“前方地星，神魔禁行。”
　　苏沐白站在无数太空舰队、机甲军团前面如此是说。
　　……
　　鹰酱：“我们都还在地星呢？你南天门计划都出来了？”
　　苏沐白：“不要怕！我很爱好和平的。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/652d238377d6a7da4b31d7ad3a858ccf","author":"宝巨要起飞","author_id":"","book_id":"7212873854509648930","book_name":"黑科技：最强军火商","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201820","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1478人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7212875850902209028","read_count":"1478","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"478089"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"225","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,开局,黑科技","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/238fa43f01cc7c9f8e008fa1c591ee84~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779321890&x-signature=yuKyTTNALTz5oELVTTgF6O0RZfU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109112501370","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.091659e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322080449D9BBDAA03BC331B87BD0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4091,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":3245},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick"
